full_text:
Tissue was minced in small pieces and dissociated with: 9.7 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 200 µl Dispase + 100 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before, in the middle, and after. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer, RBC lysis with 1 ml for 5 min + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 1 ml of media.

Cell counts:

The cell count and viability were so low that discarded all cells.

| | Dispase
1) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 0.945
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 0.164
 | viability [%] | 17.4
 | size [µm] | 8.0
2) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 1.12
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 0.144
 | viability [%] | 12.8
 | size [µm] | 6.6

in 1 ml
 | viability [%] | 15.1
